title: Great White linked Sharkling follows source when invalidated

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: This creature can only be summoned by placing "Sharkling" under this card on the field. If this card is removed from the field, changes control, or is killed, "Sharkling" follows it.

plan.title: Great White linked Sharkling follows source when invalidated
plan.summary: After Sharkling is attached under Great White, invalidate Great White and verify linked cards move with the source.

notes: Great White text: if this card is removed from the field, changes control, or is killed, Sharkling follows it.

steps: Summon Great White with Sharkling attached under it.
Invalidate Great White by moving it from field.
Verify attached Sharkling follows the source card.
manualVerification: Exact destination should follow the source movement event: removal, control change, or killed.
riskNotes: This is separate from the summon attachment branch and requires source invalidation routing.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_020_great_white-020-e03 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
